review_scope: Frozen Phase 2 full-group Round 2 bytes only; no prior Board conclusions or other seat outputs used.

frozen_cut_verification.approved_vellum_anchor_used: The hard-matte/de-shined Vellum frozen into outputs/visual_debug/vdh_runs/phase2-real-unit-calibration-c0d972a0e4/captures/P006.png; the older shiny experiment was not used.

overall.rationale: The cut is complete and materially strong, but nine units retain failed applicable gates or a below-professional critical dimension. The systemic weakness is psychology delivery: written contradictions repeatedly collapse in the frozen faces into sternness, smirks, or scowls. Veyra also fails hostile/villainous action, and several humanoids lose role or selected-silhouette intent at master or 96 px scale.

gameplay_identity_and_role_silhouette.evidence: Colossal planted feet, interception mass, and the shoulder-spanning burden read Tank/Titan.

trait_channel_separation.evidence: Blessed is carried by ruined devotional architecture and penance; Titan remains bodily scale and ground pressure.

three_distinct_rough_silhouettes.evidence: Standing arch, kneeling reliquary, and bell mass are materially distinct.

selected_master_correspondence.evidence: The master preserves selected A's bowed head beneath a broken arch burden.

peak_age_fighter.evidence: Mature peak-condition male body, neither juvenile nor elderly.

frontline_protection_explained.evidence: Calcified dermal mass and fused reliquary anatomy visibly explain durability without generic armor.

survival_psychology_record_complete.evidence: All ten fields are specific and non-placeholder.

psychology_reads_from_face.evidence: The bowed brow, fixed eye, and compressed mouth show exhaustion and accusation, but do not independently expose the fear of uselessness or the coercive need to make others indebted.

face_and_pose_agree.evidence: Bowed head, crushing burden, planted body, and low offered hand all support resentful martyrdom.

villain.evidence: The direct glare and physically imposing debt-demand gesture keep him ominous rather than saintly.

horror_threat.evidence: Fused architecture, asymmetric calcification, giant hands, and forward mass are threatening.

dominant_prop_or_anatomy.evidence: The fused broken arch/yoke is the dominant idea.

limbs_hands_props_traceable.evidence: Both arms, hands, legs, and arch attachment remain legible.

no_clutter.evidence: Surface detail is dense but subordinated to one arch-and-body hierarchy.

supernatural_cost.evidence: Stone blooms, fissures, stigmata-like chest damage, and half-calcified anatomy visibly embody redirected wounds.

dry_tactile_vellum_finish.evidence: Dry stone, dead cloth, cracked skin, and low-gloss wear meet the hard-matte material veto.

read_96px.evidence: Arch, bowed core, huge feet, and split body value remain unmistakable.

roster_distinct.evidence: No neighbor shares his human colossus plus broken devotional arch.

deliberate_horror_exception.evidence: Peak-condition humanoid lane, not an exception.

blessed_special_gate.evidence: Disgrace precedes angelic symbolism; shame, compulsory penance, and physical miracle cost are visible without wings, halo, gold, paladin armor, or pretty-sad-angel styling.

visible_face_evidence.want: Acknowledgment is suggested by the single fixed eye and tight forward mouth.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: Not sufficiently legible; lowered head reads burden but not specifically fear that his pain is unnecessary.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: The face alone does not show compulsory wound-taking; the body burden supplies that information.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: Ominous demand is present, but coercive moral debt is not face-readable without the record.
cited_visual_cues: one eye fixed upward under a bowed brow

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: Material finish and silhouette approach the approved Vellum anchor, but the anchor's specific manipulative intent is more immediately legible in the face.

gameplay_identity_and_role_silhouette.evidence: Massive nested shell and pillar legs clearly read a defensive Tank.

trait_channel_separation.evidence: Nested enclosure plates carry Aegis while square locks and buttresses carry Bulwark.

villain.evidence: Nothing in the static stance turns protection into coercive possession.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The silhouette and material finish are strong, but Vellum's controlled psychological ambiguity is replaced by a generic revenge scowl.

blockers.effect: Fails PSYCHOLOGY READS FROM FACE and leaves the professional psychology dimension below bar.
blockers.closure_condition: On the unchanged-master-derived face crop, an uninformed reviewer must identify exhausted accusation, demand for acknowledgment, concealed fear of useless suffering, and coercive debt rather than only burdened sorrow; the body must preserve the same read.

blockers.effect: Fails VILLAIN, HORROR/THREAT, and the applicable deliberate-horror exception.
blockers.closure_condition: A revised master must read as hostile possessive enclosure before egg/armadillo/passive shield, with visibly advancing or closing anatomy aimed at a target while preserving the selected cocoon-on-pillars identity and exact-96 recognition.

blockers.effect: Fails face psychology and face/pose agreement.
blockers.closure_condition: The same-master nonhuman face mechanism and body must visibly show target fixation, fear of opening, active closure, and possessive protection; symmetry cannot remain neutral.

blockers.effect: Fails the three-genuinely-distinct-roughs and selected-master-correspondence requirements.
blockers.closure_condition: Provide three materially different full silhouette hypotheses and select one; the definitive master must preserve that option's ledger placement, negative space, body axis, and casting-arm contour without hybridizing another option.

blockers.effect: Fails face-readable fear/contradiction and lowers psychology below professional.
blockers.closure_condition: The same-master face must preserve proprietary warmth and appraisal while visibly separating one memory-blank eye and concealed panic from ordinary shadow, smirk, or menace.

blockers.effect: Fails gameplay/role silhouette, selected-master correspondence, face/pose agreement, and 96 px role read.
blockers.closure_condition: Repose the same concept so the branding iron is an unmistakable diagonal attack/marking instrument, never a cane or staff; the exact 96 px derivative must retain a hostile marking/support action and both Harmony counterweights.

blockers.effect: Fails face psychology, face/pose agreement, and VILLAIN.
blockers.closure_condition: The same-master face must pin the viewer as a favored pupil and simultaneously show approval, real care, ownership, and fear of being surpassed; the directing pose must address that same pupil rather than an off-frame heroic target.

blockers.effect: Fails trait-channel hierarchy, visible supernatural cost, gameplay role, and 96 px role read.
blockers.closure_condition: Make the plane read as a controlling support/mentor apparatus rather than a crossbow, while rendering Overload as visibly painful frayed/inflamed nerves or leaking annotations instead of ornamental crown pins; prove the correction in a fresh exact 96 px derivative.

blockers.effect: Fails face psychology and face/pose agreement.
blockers.closure_condition: Align eyes, jaw, cheek, head angle, torso, and fist through one target so a reviewer can see specific grievance, rigid restraint, and anticipated relief rather than a generic upward-looking bruiser.

blockers.effect: Fails clean trait channels, no-clutter, and hard-matte Vellum material discipline.
blockers.closure_condition: Remove or subordinate chains, rings, buckles, coin ornament, and polished black leather until the wage-stamp fist and bone-debt cost are dominant; compare against approved hard-matte Vellum and show dry tarred canvas, oxidized metal, and worn workwear rather than gangster uniforming.

blockers.effect: Fails face psychology, face/pose agreement, and VILLAIN.
blockers.closure_condition: The same-master face must make one side warmly invite the viewer while the other surveils a second party, with a visible jaw/mouth leak of fear that those parties will compare notes; the pose must visibly control both ends of that relationship.

blockers.effect: Fails gameplay identity/role silhouette and exact-96 role read.
blockers.closure_condition: Preserve the physical palm-to-heel bridge but make it unmistakably a line-casting Liaison/Mage mechanism rather than a ribbon, staff, or sword; demonstrate the correction in the unchanged exact 96 px master derivative.

blockers.effect: Fails face psychology and face/pose agreement; the primary face risks a trapped-victim read.
blockers.closure_condition: The central primary face must visibly widen with collapse panic and demand payment rather than mourn or resign, while the clamp and body advance on the same target; subordinate debtor faces may remain distressed.

blockers.effect: Fails face psychology and VILLAIN by landing on the expressly forbidden generic scowl/angry revenge eye.
blockers.closure_condition: Replace generic anger with cold moral satisfaction and one controlled leak of doubt at contradictory evidence; the rifle line must still turn the target into proof, and an uninformed reviewer must reject ordinary soldier, righteous hero, and revenge-avenger reads.

blockers.effect: The humanoid emotional roster converges into stern brow compression, smirks, and scowls, violating the required villain-emotion distribution and keeping the group below professional.
blockers.closure_condition: After unit repairs, the same-master face board must show clearly distinguishable martyr accusation, acquisitive warmth/panic, ingratiating vigilance, predatory delight/pain, bureaucratic service measurement, intimate corrective ownership, restrained labor rage/relief, split invitation/surveillance, panicked entitlement, and cold certainty/doubt without relying on labels.

group_convergence_findings.finding: Emotional convergence is visible across the face board: Cashmere, Pilfer, Knoll, Quillith, Kett, Luna, and Sable cluster around controlled smirk/stern/scowl solutions while several written contradictions remain prose-only.
Role-scale body plans are diverse: the three Tanks, two Assassins, two Marksmen, and nonhuman monsters do not collapse into one silhouette family.
Dominant prop/anatomy classes are substantially varied: arch, shell, ledger, siphon hand, body-bow, blade ring, branding iron, correction plane, fist, ligament, flesh fortress, and rifle.
There is no group-wide same-face or same-body template; ethnicity, sex design, species, mass, age mechanism, and proportion are visibly varied.

The cut avoids glossy gacha, rainbow-crystal, floating-effect, horn, wing, and halo convergence. Kett locally drifts into polished black-leather/chain uniforming and is blocked under P2R2-KETT-002 rather than treated as a roster-wide failure.
The three hot-adult-woman units remain distinguishable in ethnicity, palette, dominant geometry, and exposure placement; the lane is not one identical hourglass/corset/heel template.

rejected_findings.finding: Nyxa must fail solely because she appears elderly.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The criterion allows a deliberate-horror exception. At original resolution the clawed crouch, nonhuman face/ears, body-grown blood-membrane bow, and predatory firing action read before frailty; the exception passes on the frozen bytes.

rejected_findings.finding: Sable should be subjected to hot-adult-woman and lean/toned/feminine gates because the face can be read as feminine.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The frozen psychology record explicitly assigns nonbinary/androgynous sex design; those conditional female gates are not applicable.

rejected_findings.finding: Korath requires conventional armor because he is a Tank.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The criteria explicitly forbid forced armor, and the frozen master visibly explains durability through calcification, fused anatomy, and colossal load-bearing mass.

rejected_findings.finding: Creep's face is automatically unevaluable because it lacks a mouth.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The criteria allow a deliberate nonhuman face mechanism. Hollow apertures, erased surface, head cant, and the matching loaded body provide a coherent mechanism.

rejected_findings.finding: All twelve units share one black-cloak or leather uniform.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: The full-body and role boards show strong body-plan, garment, palette, and prop separation. Kett's local leather/chain drift is real but does not justify a false whole-roster claim.

rejected_findings.finding: Every attractive female uses the same corset, heels, or identical leg-slit solution.
rejected_findings.rejected_because: Cashmere, Quillith, and Luna use different garment families, footwear/exposure, ethnic/facial design, and dominant geometry; no corset/heel template recurs across all three.

protected_dissent.position: Veyra cannot be cleared as threatening merely because a blood seam is visible; action and hostile intent must be encoded in silhouette and pose.
Written psychology cannot rescue a face that resolves to generic sternness, smirk, scowl, or passive sorrow on the same-master crop.
Quillith's exact 96 px triangle reads as a ranged weapon, not a support apparatus; text labels are not evidence of role readability.
Cashmere's master is a hybrid of roughs A and B, so the selected-master correspondence gate remains failed even though the final image is attractive and polished.
Malachor's body is excellent horror design, but the central face remains the primary psychology locus and cannot be excused as decorative when it reads like a trapped victim.
